conflicts.description: The bank's female clerk is named Miss Havel in chapter 4 but Miss Lenz in chapter 9 while filling the same single-clerk function.
conflicts.canonical_value: Treat the bank clerk as Miss Havel.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 4 embeds the clerk more deeply, with repeated beats, description, and functional continuity; chapter 9 uses Miss Lenz only in a single-scene teller reference. The minor role is not important enough to expand the sheet beyond the established core cast.
